programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Leslie Neulander dies after what appears to be an accidental fall in the shower in her New York home, two friends join forces to seek justice on her behalf; insiders speak out on the latest twists and the final chapter in the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A San Diego mother suddenly vanishes in 2014; nearly two years later, her body is found in the San Diego Bay, but medical examiners say she has only been dead for a month or two.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After police discover the burned body of a missing Miami man at the edge of the Florida Everglades, the wife of a local supermarket mogul comes forward to reveal a shocking secret and possible lead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As actress Aasha Davis' career takes off, her sister and brother-in-law go missing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A former ballerina shoots her husband in what she alleges was an act of self-defense; the ensuing investigation and dramatic trial spark protests and receives national attention.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a man claims to have found his wife dead in the bathtub, the woman's daughters suspect there may be more to the story.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A family begins a relentless pursuit of justice after the death of Nevada attorney Susan Winters is ruled a suicide; Susan's parents open up about the seven-year case and their efforts to push back against the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Chaos follows when Snooki and JWoww get the ladies to spill the tea. Vinny makes a love connection with someone unexpected. An argument between the women leads to a very awkward dinner.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Nikki invite the ladies to join a fun game of improv until things get out of hand. Vinny insults one of the ladies and ends up in the doghouse. Vinny makes a surprising move at elimination.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Excitement turns to embarrassment when the ladies' friends and family come for a visit and start revealing the ladies' secrets. Vinny gets roasted by a parent. And a dinner conversation raises red flags for Pauly and Nikki.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The pressure is on when the ladies must make good impressions on Vinny's mom, Paola, and Uncle Nino. Paola's shocking feedback leaves Vinny confused about who to send home.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Double dates with Pauly and Nikki give Vinny a glimpse at his future with "the one" as he makes his final decision. Vinny shocks one lady by sending her home early.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham searches for clues related to the existence of the Loch Ness Monster in Scotland. He also visits Australia to learn about a giant lizard called Megalania.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the English countryside to learn about mythical big cats such as the Beast of Bodmin and Beast of Exmoor.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, has truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as Diplodocus was the immense Argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Epidexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago, and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while questioning whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinosaurus.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, biomechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough shows us how ancient creatures have come to be preserved as fossils and how those fossils can shed light on characteristics of these creatures' lives, and even their death.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane with an aggressive attitude; Cesar helps a shepherd mix recover from the issues developed while living in a hoarding situation so she can be rehomed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar adopts four puppies and films them living with him and his pack for their first eight months to demonstrate how to raise a balanced dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a Shiba Inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd needs help with his territorial tendencies, and a dachshund has a habit of biting.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns that Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Legendary Bruce Lee's only complete directorial film is packed with action and epic fight scenes. Lee visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: A Game of Death
programme.desc: Billy Lo, a champion fighter and movie star, fakes his death to escape and then expose the crime syndicate that wants to control him.

programme.title: The Swordsman [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: A kung-fu manual known as the sacred scroll is stolen from the Emperor's library. An army detachment is sent to recover it. Meanwhile, a young swordsman and his fellow disciple are accidentally drawn into the chaos.

programme.title: Swordsman II [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Ling Wu Chung decides to hide from the chaotic world. Before leaving, he visits his friends, a tribe of snake-wielding women warriors. However, he finds that the tribe have been attacked, and their leader Yam Ying Ying has been abducted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve 2005, a man's body is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.desc: Lucy plays the dominant parent role in their son's life. Realizing that he needs to spend more time with his son, Ricky agrees to spend his vacation at home to care for little Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Vagaba por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York llevando solo piyamas y una bata de baño, pero el FBI estaba convencido de que Vince Gigante, el reputado jefe de la familia genovesa del crimen, no estaba loco.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Después de que un criminal con trayectoria cometiera un homicidio vehicular en Nueva Orleans, los agentes del FBI lo rastrearon por medio de sus hábitos y adicciones.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio del 1992, unos bandidos enmascarados llevaron a cabo un robo audaz durante el mediodía. Esto marcó el comienzo de una ola de crimen que sacudió Seattle.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1992, un hombre regresó a su casa en Memphis y descubrió que su esposa estaba desaparecida. El esposo, así como sus amigos, sus familiares y vecinos, empezaron a recibir llamadas al azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La corrupción en el Departamento de Policía de Nueva Orleans se expandió como un cáncer a principios de 1990.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1997, un triple homicidio aterrorizó a los residentes de la capital del país. En un café en Georgetown, tres empleados fueron asesinados por disparos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un joven y su madre fueron secuestrados y asesinados por un temible cartel de drogas, los agentes del FBI en el campo trabajaron sin descanso para colarse en el submundo secreto de las drogas y sacar a la luz a los que estaban involucrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Larry Horn casi se sale con la suya con el crimen perfecto: un complot de homicidio múltiple que había sido planeado y ejecutado meticulosamente. La exesposa de Horn, su hijo de ocho años y una niñera fueron asesinados de manera brutal por un homicida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años noventa, una banda con su base en las Islas Vírgenes de los Estados Unidos comenzó a contrabandear miles de kilos de cocaína hacia el territorio continental.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años setenta y principios de los ochenta, un grupo terrorista conocido como las FALN es considerado sospechoso de colocar bombas en ciudades importantes de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In less than a century, the world went from dirt tracks to highways, from propeller planes to space travel, from sailboats to supertankers; in the process, a glut of traffic was created on roadways, railways, airways, and seaways.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It's the place where one man's trash is truly another man's treasure; enter the mysterious world of the junkyard, where many pieces actually do add up to a whole; uncover how junkyard operators create order out of seemingly random piles of junk.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A toxic waste dump at Love Canal in Niagara Falls, N.Y.; software flaws render Patriot Missiles inaccurate; the collapse of 7 World Trade Center; the Cocoanut Grove nightclub fire in Boston.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Massachusetts Central Artery/Tunnel Project, a.k.a. The Big Dig, is an impressive municipal construction project in U.S.; its objective to replace Boston's decaying highway infrastructure with 160 new highway miles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Giant robots work factory floors and outer space; floating fortresses house 6,000 military personnel with length matching Empire State Building's height; diesel engines produce 108,000 horsepower in audacious engineering feats worldwide.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A study of the discoveries, inventions and technological advances that have helped us understand and predict weather; from observations made by early humans, to Doppler radar and satellite imaging, we'll see how man has tried to harness weather.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The ability to transmit sound in stereo transformed the music of life into a rich symphony of sound; for over 100 years, enthusiasts and scientists have worked to create the ideal listening experience; we examine this multi-billion dollar business.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: From vending to video games, payphones to parking meters, explore the inner workings of the coin-operated world.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Each year in the U.S., 280 million hens lay 80 billion eggs, one of the world's most affordable sources of protein; charting an egg's journey from the henhouse to the breakfast table; how powdered eggs are manufactured.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Different cultures' history, production and consumption of bread reveal its variety of forms, ranging from baguettes to pita, corn bread, and flour tortillas.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Food trucks are hitting the big time; across much of America, they're changing the way people eat; from humble beginnings as chuck wagons and hot dog carts, they've taken off as ethnic eateries, gourmet specialists, and even high-tech mega trucks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Through rain, snow, heat, or gloom of night, we expect postmen to deliver the mail; the U.S. Post Office handles over 603-million pieces of mail daily; yet it represents only 43% of the world's total mail volume.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Freight trains transport 1.8 billion tons annually as America's economic lifeblood, carrying crops, electronics, cars, chemicals, and coal; explore Union Pacific's Bailey yard, the world's greatest freight system, from mining tramway origins.

programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Empress
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others next head toward Varanasi. On their way there, Joseph realizes his arm is quite swollen. At first, it doesn't bother him much, but the bigger it gets, the creepier it looks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Jotaro and his group head toward Pakistan by car. Polnareff is behind the wheel on a dangerous mountain road when a mysterious vehicle starts impeding their progress.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Justice Part 1
programme.desc: After surviving another attack, Jotaro and his team make it to Pakistan, where they stop at an inn to rest. The village around the inn, however, is quiet, and its inhabitants rather odd.

programme.desc: Polnareff realizes that Enyaba is a new assassin sent by DIO. He is prevented from warning his comrades by Enyaba's Stand "Justice," which has the ability to control corpses.

programme.desc: After surviving Enyaba's attack, Jotaro and crew make it to Pakistan's capital, Karachi. There, they encounter DIO's next assassin, Dan of Steel.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Lovers Part 2
programme.desc: Dan of Steel's Stand, "The Lovers," has entered Joseph's brain. With Joseph's life on the line, Jotaro has no choice but to carry out Dan's orders, but the rest of his companions have their own say in the matter.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Sun
programme.desc: Jotaro and his fellows take camels and travel across the desert, headed for Cairo. Along the way, though, they can't shake the sensation that someone or something is watching their every move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Death 13, Part 1
programme.desc: Kakyoin dreams about being in a strange amusement park, where he encounters the Death tarot card. While in the dream he witnesses Death cut down a dog, but after waking up in terror he can't remember what the nightmare was about.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Death 13, Part 2
programme.desc: Kakyoin tries to convince the others that the baby is a Stand user, but they merely start to doubt his sanity. Unable to persuade his friends, Kakyoin resorts to some extreme measures.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Judgment, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and the team visit an island in the Red Sea and find Avdol's father, renewing the grief Polnareff felt over his friend's death. But perhaps there is a way he can right that wrong. Or not.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Judgment, Part 2
programme.desc: Polnareff revives his sister Shelly using one of his three wishes but is then attacked by her. The enemy Stand user, Cameo, then says he'll grant Polnareff's last wish and revives Avdol.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others obtain a submarine as a new means of transport, but as they travel through the Red Sea they realize that there are few places to escape to should danger arise underwater.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 2
programme.desc: The team attempts to escape the submarine with scuba gear as it sinks under attacks from the shape-changing enemy Stand "High Priestess."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends finally land in Egypt, where DIO awaits, and are cutting through the desert when a helicopter approaches. The helicopter belongs to the Speedwagon Foundation and is there to make a special delivery requested by Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 2
programme.desc: Jotaro and crew acquire the help of Iggy but are ambushed by a water Stand. With Kakyoin injured, Avdol tries out a stratagem which the unseen enemy quickly sees through. Meanwhile, Iggy is napping.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Khnum's Zenyatta and Thoth's Mondatta
programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: Wicked City
programme.desc: A secret police force known as the Black Guard protects the boundary between the human world and the demon world.

programme.desc: Durante otra emboscada del Equipo Rocket, un joven Entrenador y su Ledyba ayudan a nuestros héroes a derrotarlos. Pero, en medio del caos, su Ledyba se separa del grupo, ¿dónde podrá estar?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes paran a descansar en el Centro Pokémon, que es administrado por un amable pero confundido Blissey. Las cosas sólo empeoran cuando un viejo amigo de Blissey llega inesperadamente…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Llegando por fin a Ciudad Violeta, la búsqueda del Gimnasio de Ash es frenada por un viaje a la Academia Pokémon local. Ash interpreta bien su papel de maestro, ¡hasta que un alumno huye con Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Es hora de la primera batalla de Gimnasio de la Liga Johto de Ash, y él se siente confiado. Pero el Pokémon tipo Volador de Falkner demuestra ser un duro competidor. ¿Ganará Ash y obtendrá su primera medalla de Gimnasio?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras ganar su primera medalla de Gimnasio en Johto, Ash y sus amigos encuentran a un lindo Marill que no deja de llorar. Nada de lo que hacen nuestros héroes lo tranquiliza, y el ataque del Equipo Rocket de verdad no ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El último invento del Equipo Rocket será un éxito… ¡hasta que Togepi y su nuevo amigo Sentret se lo llevan de paseo!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash escucha de un lugar de entrenamiento para Charizard salvajes y decide que es el lugar para perfeccionar la fuerza de su Charizard. Pero las duras lecciones a aprender cambiarán la amistad de Ash y Charizard para siempre.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia el Gimnasio Azalea, nuestros héroes descubren un festival de Sunflora en un pueblo cercano y conocen a un Entrenador cuya Sunflora está demasiado triste para competir. ¿Podrán Ash y sus amigos alegrarla?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: A Ash se le está dificultando hacer que Chikorita lo obedezca, y la Enfermera Joy cree que se debe a celos por la amistad de Ash con Pikachu. ¿Podrá Ash probarle a Chikorita lo mucho que significa para él?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un Entrenador cuyos Hoppip pueden predecir el clima. Pero dos tormentas se acercan en el horizonte... ¡Y una de ellas se llama "Equipo Rocket"!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El legendario superhéroe Gligarman envejece y considera colgar su capa. Cuando Ash y sus amigos vagan por el pueblo, traen consigo un reto que podría ser su batalla final: ¡el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando una revoltosa horda de Mareep arruina sus planes de almuerzo, nuestros héroes deciden ayudar a su tímido pastor, justo a tiempo para competir en un festival de batalla local.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante de un centro de entrenamiento Pokémon pierde su interés en las batallas Pokémon y prefiere construir una gran base de datos Pokémon, Ash debe convencerlo de que las batallas son más que probabilidad.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash encuentra un Cyndaquil salvaje, está ansioso por atraparlo… ¡pero pueden apostar que no es el único!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras llegar a Pueblo Azalea, Ash descuidadamente provoca a sus residentes, quienes adoran a SlowPoké. Y las cosas sólo empeoran cuando llega el Equipo Rocket, tratando de robar hasta al último SlowPoké. ¿Qué podrá hacer Ash?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tal como prometió al Profesor Oak, Ash entrega la misteriosa Bola GS a un renovado experto en Pokébolas. Pero el fruto de su trabajo casi se arruina cuando el Equipo Rocket aparece en escena.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash Ketchum, un niño de diez años de Pueblo Paleta, finalmente tiene la edad para recibir a su primer Pokémon! Sin embargo, se queda dormido y el único Pokémon restante en el laboratorio del profesor Oak es un terco Pikachu.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Maximum Revenge

programme.title: RiffTrax: Silent Rage
programme.desc: You'll laugh, you'll cry, and you probably won't be so silent about the great deal of rage you'll feel. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Kill Or Be Killed
programme.desc: Kill or Be Killed is a cornucopia of wonders, specifically South African martial arts wonders. It's got a long-haired karate hero and a whacked-out plot. Join Mike, Kevin & Bill as they riff or be killed!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Kill and Kill Again
programme.desc: It’s your standard South African martial arts extravaganza based around root vegetable gasoline. You’re gonna love it, and love it again, with Mike, Kevin and Bill! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Omega Cop
programme.desc: The surest way to tell you're in for a really crappy movie, (other than “Written and directed by James Nguyen”) is the word Cop appearing in the movie title.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Breaker Breaker
programme.desc: Breaker Breaker is a Chuck Norris filled tale of moonshine, hillbillies, and sweet airbrushed eagles on the side of vans! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: To acquire the resources to cure a space plague, Kirk must resolve a mining dispute between the cultural elites of the cloud city of Stratos and the miners on the surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock meet Abraham Lincoln and Surak of Vulcan and must battle with some of history's most terrible villains.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, Spock, and McCoy enter a time portal and get stuck in the past on a planet about to be consumed by a nova.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise is in danger when Janice Lester, one of Kirk's former lovers, steals his body.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and his crew are at deadly risk from an alien creature that feeds on the salt in a human body and can take on any form.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A powerful teenage boy wreaks havoc aboard the U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk's friend, Gary Mitchell, is transformed into a God-like entity.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A strange alien substance causes the crew to act out their deepest inhibitions, while the ship plummets out of orbit.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A transporter malfunction causes Captain Kirk to split into his "good" and "evil" selves, and a landing party will freeze to death if the crew is unable to find a way to merge the two Kirks back together.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a intergalactic conman, Harry Mudd, and three incredibly beautiful women who harbor a dark secret.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kor, a revered Klingon warrior, sets out with Worf and Dax in search of a mythical, ancient artifact they believe has the power to unite the Klingon Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Posing as a 1960's secret agent in a malfunctioning Hootsuite program, Bashir is all that stands between his trapped fellow officers and certain death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Evidence that Changelings are targeting Earth sends Sisko back to his home planet, where he and Odo must prevent--or prepare for--war with the Dominion.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Preparing Earth for war with the Dominion, Sisko and Odo discover evidence of a Starfleet plot to seize control of the planet from the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo's hidden feelings for Kira interfere with his duty to protect the Bajoran First Minister--who also happens to be attracted to her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A demoted Dukat enlists Kira's aid in regaining his former status in the Cardassian Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Cast out of Klingon society because of Worf's dishonor, his outcast brother asks Worf to kill him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Tired of workplace mistreatment at the hands of his brother, Rom organizes all of Quark's employees into a union and goes on strike against the bar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A legendary Bajoran appears mysteriously after more than two hundred years and challenges Sisko's claim to be the Emissary.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The Klingon Empire accuses Worf of wantonly destroying a Klingon civilian ship during a battle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: After an alien race implants false memories of a twenty-year prison sentence into O'Brien's brain, he has trouble readjusting to station life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko follows his son into a war-torn alternate universe after Jake is lured there by the living counterpart of his late mother.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Odo provides shelter for a pregnant Lwaxana Troi, Jake Sisko falls under the spell of a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko is shocked to learn that his girlfriend, Kasidy Yates, may be a Maquis smuggler.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While enduring the Enterprise's promotion evaluation process, four junior officers find themselves involved in a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Having completely lost his memory, Data is stranded on a primitive planet where the inhabitants fear he is carrying a deadly plague.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While an alien archive transforms the Enterprise into its ancient society, Data is taken over by several different personalities from the extinct civilization.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While experiencing empathic visions after an officer's mysterious suicide, Troi becomes romantically involved with Worf.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and Data return to the Enterprise to discover that the entire crew has de-evolved into prehistoric beings.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard is forced to relocate American Indians from a planet they have settled, while a colonist causes Wesley to re-examine his future.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A mysterious family friend arrives to help transform Worf's reluctant son Alexander into a warrior.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard learns that he has a son, and that the young man has been targeted for murder by an old enemy in search of revenge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The lives of the Enterprise crew are endangered when the ship suddenly develops its own intelligence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ro Laren is forced to choose between her loyalty to Picard and her hatred toward Cardassia when she accepts an assignment to infiltrate the Maquis.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard finds himself travelling between the past, present, and future while attempting to prevent the destruction of humanity... by his own actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is carrying an eminent scientist, Dr. Paul Stubbs, to the site of a binary star where they are expecting a massive stellar explosion to occur in a few hours.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a century of silence, the Enterprise receives a message from the Sheliac system informing them that they have discovered a human colony on a world in their sector.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven experiences the Borg version of multiple personality disorder.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres is forced to put her life in the hands of a mortal enemy that uses biochemical secretions to give commands.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris is confined to the Brig after interfering with the affairs of an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway falls for a man who may be using her to take over Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded on a desolate planet with a beautiful female, Tuvok struggles to ignore the emotions his Vulcan master taught him to suppress.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is in serious danger when all of their dreams seem to come true and home seems closer in sight.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: During a mission against the Borg, Seven of Nine is lured back to the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim puts his future with Voyager at risk when he chooses love over duty.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: As crewmembers begin dying, they make a startling discovery about their true identities.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Atlantis is suddenly plunged into darkness, with only the top tier of the central tower unaffected. As Sheppard and McKay attempt to get to the top level, they discover that a force field has been established to prevent them from gaining access.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When the Atlantis team is given two weeks of vacation leave, Dr. Rodney McKay reluctantly accepts an invitation by his former rival, Malcolm Tunney, to attend a scientific demonstration that he claims will be the solution to global warming.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Captain Carter unwillingly becomes the host to a dying Tok'ra, a member of the resistance whose noble goal is to overthrow the evil Goa'uld empire. Now she sees through the Tok'ra's eyes, but can her visions help the SG-1 team save the Tok'ra?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra are desperate for hosts so they can continue fighting the Goa'uld. Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, has nothing to lose by volunteering his body. But will he die during the transference...or does fate have something else in store?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-11 vanishes while negotiating the mining rights on a planet inhabited by a tribe known as the Salish. Can the SG-1 team find their lost colleagues without angering the planet's mystical spirits...or will they become their next victims?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A climate-controlling touchstone is stolen from planet Madrona, causing the weather to rapidly deteriorate. And when the SG-1 team is accused of the theft, O'Neill must pursue the real thief and rescue the missing stone before Madrona perishes.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While studying alien wall inscriptions on another planet, O'Neill peers into a viewer that unleashes ancient knowledge into his mind like computer virus. Can the SG-1 team reverse the process before his mind is completely reconfigured.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A black hole swallows the SG-10 team, and O'Neill is sent on a rescue mission. As the hole's pull grows stronger, it draws the Stargate toward it and soon threatens to destroy Earth. Will O'Neill find a way to stop this super-destructive force?

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the men begin their long march south for rescue, a series of shocking events underscores how vulnerable and exposed their situation has become.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life. Extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart. Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary. An outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some 'groove booties' programmed to dance to any beat.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry spends all her time emulating her literary detective hero and ignores her friends, until Strawberry gives her a 'missing person case' to solve—the missing person being Blueberry herself!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry fills in at the bumblebee post office and learns that sometimes even when you try your very best, things don't always turn out as planned.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn’t want them to find out, she’s afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
